class CATEEstimator(BaseCATEEstimator):
    """Overlap-adaptive orthogonal stacking with disagreement shrinkage."""

    def __init__(self):
        self.k, self.clip = 3, 0.03

    def _y(self, d=3, lin=False):
        return Pipeline([("s", StandardScaler()), ("m", Ridge(alpha=1.0))]) if lin else GradientBoostingRegressor(
            n_estimators=100, max_depth=d, learning_rate=0.05,
            min_samples_leaf=20, subsample=0.8, random_state=42)

    def _t(self, lin=False):
        return Pipeline([("s", StandardScaler()), ("m", LogisticRegression(C=1.0, max_iter=1000))]) if lin else GradientBoostingClassifier(
            n_estimators=100, max_depth=3, learning_rate=0.05,
            min_samples_leaf=20, subsample=0.8, random_state=42)

    def _fitb(self, X, y, d=3): return [self._y(d).fit(X, y), self._y(lin=True).fit(X, y)]
    def _predb(self, m, X): return 0.8 * m[0].predict(X) + 0.2 * m[1].predict(X)
    def _eh(self, mg, ml, X): return 0.8 * mg.predict_proba(X)[:, 1] + 0.2 * ml.predict_proba(X)[:, 1]

    def fit(self, X, T, Y):
        X, T, Y = np.asarray(X), np.asarray(T).astype(int), np.asarray(Y)
        n = len(Y)
        kf = KFold(n_splits=self.k, shuffle=True, random_state=42)
        mu0, mu1, m, e = np.zeros(n), np.zeros(n), np.zeros(n), np.zeros(n)

        for tr, va in kf.split(X):
            xtr, xva, ttr, ytr = X[tr], X[va], T[tr], Y[tr]
            mu0[va] = self._predb(self._fitb(xtr[ttr == 0], ytr[ttr == 0]), xva)
            mu1[va] = self._predb(self._fitb(xtr[ttr == 1], ytr[ttr == 1]), xva)
            m[va] = self._predb(self._fitb(xtr, ytr, 2), xva)
            mg, ml = self._t().fit(xtr, ttr), self._t(True).fit(xtr, ttr)
            e[va] = self._eh(mg, ml, xva)

        e = np.clip(e, self.clip, 1 - self.clip)
        r = T - e
        safe = np.sign(r + 1e-8) * np.maximum(np.abs(r), 0.05)
        gate, w = np.clip(4 * e * (1 - e), 0.0, 1.0), r ** 2 + 1e-3
        tau_t = mu1 - mu0
        pdr = tau_t + T * (Y - mu1) / e - (1 - T) * (Y - mu0) / (1 - e)
        pr = (Y - m) / safe
        pto = r * (Y - m) / (e * (1 - e))
        for z in (pdr, pr, pto):
            q = np.percentile(np.abs(z), 98)
            z[:] = np.clip(z, -q, q)

        target, sw = (1 - gate) * pdr + gate * (0.7 * pto + 0.3 * pr), 0.2 + gate + w
        P = np.zeros((n, 4)); P[:, 0] = tau_t
        for tr, va in kf.split(X):
            P[va, 1] = self._y(2).fit(X[tr], pdr[tr], sample_weight=sw[tr]).predict(X[va])
            P[va, 2] = self._y(2).fit(X[tr], pto[tr], sample_weight=0.1 + gate[tr]).predict(X[va])
            P[va, 3] = self._y(3).fit(X[tr], pr[tr], sample_weight=w[tr]).predict(X[va])

        st = Ridge(alpha=0.5, fit_intercept=False).fit(P, target, sample_weight=sw)
        a = np.maximum(st.coef_, 0); self.a_ = a / a.sum() if a.sum() > 1e-8 else np.ones(4) / 4
        self.mu0_, self.mu1_ = self._fitb(X[T == 0], Y[T == 0]), self._fitb(X[T == 1], Y[T == 1])
        self.m_, self.tg_, self.tl_ = self._fitb(X, Y, 2), self._t().fit(X, T), self._t(True).fit(X, T)
        self.dr_ = self._y(2).fit(X, pdr, sample_weight=sw)
        self.to_ = self._y(2).fit(X, pto, sample_weight=0.1 + gate)
        self.rr_ = self._y(3).fit(X, pr, sample_weight=w)
        P = np.column_stack([self._predb(self.mu1_, X) - self._predb(self.mu0_, X), self.dr_.predict(X), self.to_.predict(X), self.rr_.predict(X)])
        raw, base = P.dot(self.a_), P[:, 0]
        eh = np.clip(self._eh(self.tg_, self.tl_, X), self.clip, 1 - self.clip)
        disp = ((P[:, 1:] - P[:, 1:].mean(1, keepdims=True)) ** 2).mean(1)
        self.ds_, self.ate_ = np.median(disp) + 1e-6, pdr.mean()
        shrink = (0.25 + 0.75 * np.clip(4 * eh * (1 - eh), 0, 1)) / (1 + disp / self.ds_)
        self.off_ = self.ate_ - (base + shrink * (raw - base)).mean()
        return self

    def predict(self, X):
        eh = np.clip(self._eh(self.tg_, self.tl_, X), self.clip, 1 - self.clip)
        P = np.column_stack([self._predb(self.mu1_, X) - self._predb(self.mu0_, X), self.dr_.predict(X), self.to_.predict(X), self.rr_.predict(X)])
        raw, base = P.dot(self.a_), P[:, 0]
        disp = ((P[:, 1:] - P[:, 1:].mean(1, keepdims=True)) ** 2).mean(1)
        shrink = (0.25 + 0.75 * np.clip(4 * eh * (1 - eh), 0, 1)) / (1 + disp / self.ds_)
        return base + shrink * (raw - base) + self.off_
